remember: Students will be able to recall the principles and processes of biotechnology.
Students will be able to list the applications of biotechnology in various fields.
Students will be able to identify the key biotechnological tools and techniques.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of biotechnology and its importance.
Students will be able to describe the role of enzymes in biotechnology.
Students will be able to discuss the advantages and limitations of biotechnology.
apply: Students will be able to apply biotechnological tools and techniques to solve real-world problems.
Students will be able to design an experiment to isolate and purify a DNA fragment using recombinant DNA technology.
Students will be able to use biotechnological principles to develop a new product or process.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of biotechnology on society and the environment.
Students will be able to evaluate the ethical implications of biotechnological applications.
Students will be able to compare the advantages and disadvantages of different biotechnological techniques.

ncert_objectives: Explain the principles of biotechnology and its applications in various fields.
Describe the role of enzymes as biocatalysts in biotechnology.
Discuss the advantages and limitations of biotechnology and its impact on society and the environment.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the concept of genetic engineering and its applications.
Describe the process of DNA cloning and its significance in biotechnology.
Discuss the use of biotechnology in the development of genetically modified crops and its impact on agriculture.
